_comment: Data-driven Cloudflare deploy manifest. Single source of truth for which
workers the deploy pipeline knows about. Consumed by
workflow runs to compute a per-worker deploy matrix from the files that
actually changed. To onboard a new worker: add an entry here (name = the
wrangler.toml `name`, dir = its folder under cloudflare/). No workflow edit needed.
health_url is polled after deploy as a SOFT signal (warning only, never fails
the job — `wrangler deploy` exit code is the authoritative success gate). Leave
it "" to skip the health poll for that worker.
A worker MUST carry a committed package-lock.json to be listed here (CI installs
with lockfile-only `npm ci` — see DEPLOY.md). The legacy *-rotation workers and
the Pages project are intentionally omitted until they carry a reviewed lock.
